title: What Do You Think Maris Theme Should Be
display_title: What Do You Think Maris Theme Should Be
wikitext:
[]: What Do You Think Mari's Theme Should Be?             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Fri Mar 25, 2011 11:04 pm I've been listening to Evangelion S² Works, and I stumbled upon a beautiful piano piece by Shiro Sagisu. The piece is called "M-2 first collection", or as I like to call it "Everything's Alright". For some reason, when hearing it, I kept thinking of Mari and I thought "this would be her theme if she was in the original. Of course, I could be wrong... So what about y'all tasteless genitalia? What should be the theme for Mari Illustrious Makinami?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Mar 26, 2011 12:16 am 365-Step March.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Mar 26, 2011 8:20 am THE A -TEAM theme . Play that theme in your head that theme every time she pilots an Eva, or even shows up on screen. It's awesome.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sat Mar 26, 2011 12:42 pm Polovtsian Dances

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Sat Mar 26, 2011 1:19 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: THE A -TEAM theme . Play that theme in your head that theme every time she pilots an Eva, or even shows up on screen. It's awesome.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat Mar 26, 2011 2:26 pm Well, the actual movie gives her classic-esque, bombastic music whenever she steps on the screen - then again, most battle scenes are full of that. They only kept the Music from Asuka's introduction battle, if with added guitars. I'd say 365 Days March sumps her up perfectly - She might get some sort of Theme in Q, tough.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sat Mar 26, 2011 5:10 pm for me, it depends on 3.0/4.0 if they are good or better than good, I suggest this if they are not, I suggest this one

Article: What Do You Think Maris Theme Should Be
[]: What Do You Think Mari's Theme Should Be?             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Fri Mar 25, 2011 11:04 pm I've been listening to Evangelion S² Works, and I stumbled upon a beautiful piano piece by Shiro Sagisu. The piece is called "M-2 first collection", or as I like to call it "Everything's Alright". For some reason, when hearing it, I kept thinking of Mari and I thought "this would be her theme if she was in the original. Of course, I could be wrong... So what about y'all tasteless genitalia? What should be the theme for Mari Illustrious Makinami?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Mar 26, 2011 12:16 am 365-Step March.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Mar 26, 2011 8:20 am THE A -TEAM theme . Play that theme in your head that theme every time she pilots an Eva, or even shows up on screen. It's awesome.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sat Mar 26, 2011 12:42 pm Polovtsian Dances

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Sat Mar 26, 2011 1:19 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: THE A -TEAM theme . Play that theme in your head that theme every time she pilots an Eva, or even shows up on screen. It's awesome.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat Mar 26, 2011 2:26 pm Well, the actual movie gives her classic-esque, bombastic music whenever she steps on the screen - then again, most battle scenes are full of that. They only kept the Music from Asuka's introduction battle, if with added guitars. I'd say 365 Days March sumps her up perfectly - She might get some sort of Theme in Q, tough.
